Index.meta_title: TalentStream AI - AI recruitment operations for modern hiring teams.
Index.meta_description: TalentStream AI helps recruiters manage jobs, candidates, pipelines, and AI-assisted hiring workflows.

Hero.title: Recruiting operations powered by <important>AI match intelligence</important>.
Hero.description: TalentStream AI gives recruiters one workspace to manage jobs, candidates, screenings, interviews, and hiring pipelines.

Features.section_title: Run recruiter-first hiring workflows in TalentStream AI
Features.section_description: Coordinate open roles, candidate reviews, match scores, and pipeline stages from one operations workspace.
Features.feature_description: Keep recruiting teams focused on the next best action across every role and candidate.

Pricing.section_description: Choose the TalentStream AI workspace that fits your hiring volume.
